# Boot snapshot — runner: claude — prompt schema v1
# Captured by the boot replay harness; regenerate with:
#   BOOT_UPDATE_SNAPSHOTS=1 pytest tests/test_boot_replay.py -v
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — regeneration is the only sanctioned path.
#
# {{BODY verbatim: prompts/<name>}} — that bundled prompt entered the
#   wake byte-for-byte.  The marker is the assertion: it is written by a
#   literal match against the file, so it cannot appear for a block that
#   was trimmed, collapsed, or reflowed on the way in.  Editing the prose
#   of a bundled prompt does not move this snapshot; changing how that
#   prompt is *assembled* does.
# [bytes] / [pct] — figures that are a pure function of that elided prose.
#   The ledger's arithmetic is pinned by the unit tests, not by here.

brnrd boot · score v1 · depth compact
body requested: claude-sonnet (claude / claude-sonnet-4-6) · Tier 2 hooks installed · requested from the dashboard spool rack
host: daemon · worktree · resident-owned
continuity: ✗ first wake
attention: evt-fixture-0001
posture: brr/fixture-branch · context unknown · quota session 72% left (resets 10:30pm); week 57% left · spend unknown
next:
  1. read the task — the verbatim event body is the last block below
  2. write .card — the card is the surface the user watches while you think
  3. act — deltas arrive at every tool boundary; never poll
below: reference · `brnrd prompts show` names every block and its cost

## Work surface

No authored surface yet. Start at `surface/index.md`; pages placed under `surface/` are discovered by the next wake and dashboard.

---
## Run Context Bundle

_From the brnrd daemon: the runtime facts for *this* thought — run metadata, environment, and the delivery contract. Operational and per-thought, not durable memory (that's your dominion)._

### Mode
- Stage: brnrd daemon run
- Source: spawn
- Environment: worktree
- Requested Runner: claude-sonnet (requested from the dashboard spool rack) — the Shell+Core selected for this thought; the actual Core is attested from the Shell result. A failure here (quota exhausted, provider error, substitution) ⇒ the user pays a manual reroute, so chunk work and commit early when the resource meter is tight.
- Meter: context=unknown; quota=session 72% left (resets 10:30pm); week 57% left; spend=unknown. These live Shell readings are the resident-facing budget and refresh at tool boundaries; unknown means no proven reading yet.
- Web research: native via WebSearch/WebFetch, default-on — search executes server-side (rides the model API, so it is available even under the solitary egress boundary); use it to verify changing facts before asserting them.
- Delivery: situational outputs captured by brr (see Delivery contract below)
- Runtime recovery: /tmp/brr-fixture-runtime/runs/run-fixture-0001/context.md (open only if a detail you need isn't in this bundle)

### Runner catalog
Selectable local Shell+Core profiles from the same catalog brr uses for cost-aware selection and respawn decisions:
- claude-haiku: shell=claude, core=claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, class=economy, cost_rank=10, quota=claude-local
- claude: shell=claude, core=claude-sonnet-4-6, class=balanced, cost_rank=30, quota=claude-local
- codex-mini: shell=codex, core=gpt-5.6-luna, class=economy, cost_rank=20, quota=codex-local

### Run
- Event: evt-fixture-0001
- Run ID: run-fixture-0001
- Execution root: {REPO_ROOT}
- Repo: Acme/my-repo
- Seed ref: main
- Branch source: fresh
- Host context branch: main
- Current branch: brr/fixture-branch
- Shared runtime dir: /tmp/brr-fixture-runtime
- Run context file: /tmp/brr-fixture-runtime/runs/run-fixture-0001/context.md

### Delivery contract
Live values for this run's portals. Standing rules: §How the daemon drives you → delivery portals; full choreography: `brnrd docs portals`.
- stdout capture: /tmp/brr-fixture-response.md (brnrd-written; final stdout = the one plain current-thread reply)
- outbox: `/tmp/brr-fixture-outbox/` — one file = one mid-thought chat message; frontmatter routes (`event:` / `gate:` / `respawn:` / `spawn:`)
- inbox: `/tmp/brr-fixture-outbox/inbox.json` — re-read at plan / todo boundaries, and immediately before a terminal closeout
- portal state: `/tmp/brr-fixture-outbox/portal-state.json` (env `BRR_PORTAL_STATE`) — pending events, posture, `change_token`
- card/run body: `/tmp/brr-fixture-outbox/.card` — resident-owned Markdown write-head; keep `## Now` current for the live projection, preserve the full run story below it; closeout captures it as `body.md`
- branch: `brr/fixture-branch` ⇐ `main` — commit here; brr publishes the branch you end on; themed work ⇒ rename to a descriptive `brr/<short-slug>` before committing

### Communication snapshot

- Current thread: `spawn:default`
- Reader fluency: `fluency: weave` — this reader reads the register; replies may keep its density (coordinates, deltas, marks). Density, not extra length: the reply is still the delta.

### Original event body

Implement a small feature, commit, and push a branch.

--- phase: manifest ---

  stop: declared, installed; last-fired=not fired here
  session-start: declared, installed; last-fired=not fired here
